name: frame_skip
description: Skips unchanged frames with adaptive backoff. Static mode for manga/wikipedia, dynamic mode for games/video with region-level change detection.
author: OptikR Team

similarity_threshold.description: Frame similarity threshold (0.8-0.99). Higher = stricter matching.

max_skip_frames.description: Maximum consecutive skipped frames before forcing a re-process

comparison_method.description: Frame comparison method. MSE is recommended for robustness.

adaptive_backoff.description: When enabled, capture rate slows down progressively on static content

content_mode.description: static = manga/wikipedia (cheap, adaptive backoff). dynamic = games/video (uses frame differencing for partial OCR on changed regions).

performance.dynamic_mode: 50-70% CPU reduction, ~5-10ms per frame check but enables partial OCR
